text: I feel both curiosity and a subtle awe. The modern, almost sterile glass and metal architecture of the entrance contrasts with the inviting, colorful R+D display inside. The visible text and interactive exhibits remind me of humanity's drive to discover and improve. There is a gentle hum of creative energy here—a place where ideas are nurtured and shared. Stepping inside, I feel a sense of optimism about human potential and our ability to shape the future thoughtfully.
